results.name: parity_2_ftmo

verdicts.assumptions: iid attempts & months (reset-to-initial payouts); independence across phases; subscription fees on mean attempt duration; INCOMPLETE charged to sim cap
verdicts.caveat: CRITICAL: this bootstraps the 2023-2024 OOS window only — a FAVORABLE, rate-trending regime. The forex edge is REGIME-FRAGILE: rolling walk-forward was 2021 -0.13 / 2022 +0.51 / 2023 +1.26 / 2024 -0.09. In a flat/adverse regime these numbers would be materially worse. Fresh 2025-26 measured ≈ FLAT (v015 remeasurement, 2026-06-27).
